query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.companyName,
  p.address,
  p.city,
  p.postalCode,
  p.country,
  p.latitude,
  p.longitude,
  p.primaryContactEmail
FROM partners p
WHERE p.isActive = 1
ORDER BY p.companyName;
